Use input ["AB"] with scale 2 — note: the spec says EACH PIXEL is replicated `scale` times horizontally. So "AB" with scale 2 should produce "AABB" not "ABAB". Expected output: ["AABB", "AABB"]. This will require changing implementation since current code uses row.repeat(scale) which produces "ABAB".

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
